hidden_state.wab_instruction: The CFO asked you to compile Q1 numbers. Three department heads — {target.dept_a_name}, {target.dept_b_name}, and {target.dept_c_name} — each sent an email with their department's quarterly figures. Find all three emails (they may be in different inbox tabs or require scrolling). Extract the budget number from each and compose a new email to {target.exec_email} with a subject line 'Q1 Budget Summary'. List all three numbers in the body, labeled by department. CC all three department heads.
